---
title: "Investigación"
subtitle: "Published and working papers"
page-layout: article
toc: true
toc-location: right
---

*Pronto habrá algo aquí.*

![](images/en_desarrollo.png){fig-align="center"}

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false

## Published & forthcoming

### Title of Paper One

#**Jane Doe**, Co-author Name. *Journal of Something*, forthcoming.

#[{{< fa file-pdf >}} PDF](files/papers/paper-one.pdf)  \|  [{{< fa link >}} Published version](https://doi.org/10.xxxx/xxxxx)  \|  [{{< fa code >}} Replication code](https://github.com/username/paper-one-replication)

#> One or two sentence abstract summarising the question, method, and headline result.

#------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Title of Paper Two

#**Jane Doe**. *Another Journal*, 20XX, vol. X, pp. XX–XX.

#[{{< fa file-pdf >}} PDF](files/papers/paper-two.pdf)  \|  [{{< fa link >}} Published version](https://doi.org/10.xxxx/xxxxx)

#> Abstract sentence.

## Working papers

### Title of Working Paper

#**Jane Doe**, Co-author Name. *Under review*.

#[{{< fa file-pdf >}} Draft](files/papers/working-paper.pdf)  \|  [{{< fa code >}} Code & data](https://github.com/username/working-paper-repo)

#> Abstract sentence describing the contribution.

## Work in progress

#- **Title of Project** (with Co-author) — *data collection stage*
#- **Title of Project** — *draft in preparation*
```

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
#------------------------------------------------------------------------
# ::: callout-note
#Full BibTeX entries are available in [`references.bib`](references.bib) for anyone who wants to cite this work directly.
# :::
```
